title: Color Coding Boards in the Side-bar
excerpt: Similar to folders, it would be nice to be able to color code certain boards in the side bar as well. We will have folders that have a long list of boards, so color coding those can help differentiate however we need to. …

posts.author: Linds_26 (Lindsay Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to folders, it would be nice to be able to color code certain boards in the side bar as well. We will have folders that have a long list of boards, so color coding those can help differentiate however we need to.

posts.author: klm170 (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml: I would find this very useful also. Would help when we have a large number of boards.
